body: Tag a patch release so ClimaCoupler can use Thermodynamics v0.14 downstream (compat added in https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaOcean.jl/pull/603)
title: Bump patch release v0.8.3

body:
This pull request changes the compat entry for the `JLD2` package from `0.4, 0.5` to `0.4, 0.5, 0.6`.
This keeps the compat entries for earlier versions.



Note: I have not tested your package with this new compat entry.
It is your responsibility to make sure that your package tests pass before you merge this pull request.
title: CompatHelper: bump compat for JLD2 to 0.6, (keep existing compat)
